# Doğru Kanzlei — hasandogru.de

> Turkish-German cross-border law firm in Mannheim, Germany.
> Founded and led by Hasan Doğru, licensed at both the Ankara Bar Association (No. 47068) and the Karlsruhe Bar Association under §207 BRAO.

## Firm
- Name: Doğru Kanzlei
- Lawyer: Hasan Doğru (Avukat / Rechtsanwalt)
- Location: R1 2,3, 68161 Mannheim, Germany
- Second office: Çankaya / Ankara, Turkey
- Languages: Turkish, German, English
- Experience: 15+ years
- Google rating: 5.0 stars (70+ reviews)

## Practice Areas
- Recognition & enforcement of Turkish judgments in Germany (Tanıma & Tenfiz)
- Inheritance law Germany–Turkey (Erbrecht, Veraset İlamı)
- Family law and custody (Sorgerecht, HKÜ)
- Migration law (Migrationsrecht, Mavi Kart / Blue Card)
- Criminal law (Strafrecht, Interpol matters)
- Real estate law Germany–Turkey (Immobilienrecht, Gayrimenkul)
- Digital access to Turkish courts (UYAP system)

## Dual Bar Admission
Licensed under §207 BRAO, allowing full Turkish-law practice in Germany.
Ankara Bar Association membership No. 47068.
